intentSynonyms: create a dns zone in netlify
add a dns zone in netlify
make a new dns zone in netlify
open a new dns zone in netlify
create a new dns zone in netlify
description: Create a new DNS zone for a domain in a Netlify account. Optionally associate it with a specific site. The zone manages DNS records for the domain.

account_slug.description: The account slug to create the zone in

name.description: The domain name for the zone (e.g. "example.com")

site_id.description: Optional site ID to associate the zone with
